# services.vlagent

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.vlagent`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.vlagent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable VictoriaMetrics's `vlagent`. `vlagent` is a tiny agent which helps you collect logs from various sources and store them in VictoriaLogs . |
| `services.vlagent.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra args to pass to `vlagent`. See the docs: <https://docs.victoriametrics.com/vlagent.html#advanced-usage> or {command}`vlagent -help` for more information. |
| `services.vlagent.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for the default ports. |
| `services.vlagent.package` | `package` | The vlagent package to use. |
| `services.vlagent.remoteWrite.basicAuthPasswordFile` | `null or string` | File that contains the Basic Auth password used to connect to remote_write endpoint |
| `services.vlagent.remoteWrite.basicAuthUsername` | `null or string` | Basic Auth username used to connect to remote_write endpoint |
| `services.vlagent.remoteWrite.maxDiskUsagePerUrl` | `null or string` | The maximum file-based buffer size in bytes. Supports the following optional suffixes for size values: KB, MB, GB, TB, KiB, MiB, GiB, TiB. See docs for more infomations: <https://docs.victoriametrics.com/vlagent.html#advanced-usage> |
| `services.vlagent.remoteWrite.url` | `null or string` | Endpoint for the victorialogs instance |
